cards.title: Hour 1 — 12 AM
cards.message: The moment the clock strikes midnight, my heart skips a beat knowing it's YOUR day! 🎉

cards.title: Hour 2 — 1 AM
cards.message: At 1 AM, the world is quiet but my love for you is loud and clear! 💕

cards.title: Hour 3 — 2 AM
cards.message: 2 AM thoughts? Just you, always you. 💫

cards.title: Hour 4 — 3 AM
cards.message: Even at 3 AM, you're the most beautiful dream I've ever had. 🌙

cards.title: Hour 5 — 4 AM
cards.message: 4 AM and I'm still thinking about how lucky I am to have you. 🍀

cards.title: Hour 6 — 5 AM
cards.message: 5 AM: The sun is getting ready, just like my love — always rising for you. 🌅

cards.title: Hour 7 — 6 AM
cards.message: 6 AM: Good morning, birthday queen! The world is brighter because of you. 👑

cards.title: Hour 8 — 7 AM
cards.message: 7 AM: Rise and shine, my love! Today is YOUR day! ☀️

cards.title: Hour 9 — 8 AM
cards.message: 8 AM: Breakfast tastes sweeter knowing it's your birthday. 🥞

cards.title: Hour 10 — 9 AM
cards.message: 9 AM: Every smile you give today makes the world a better place. 😊

cards.title: Hour 11 — 10 AM
cards.message: 10 AM: Sending you a thousand hugs and a million kisses! 💋

cards.title: Hour 12 — 11 AM
cards.message: 11 AM: Halfway through the morning, but my celebration for you never stops! 🎊

cards.title: Hour 13 — 12 PM
cards.message: 12 PM: Happy noon, birthday star! Keep shining bright! ⭐

cards.title: Hour 14 — 1 PM
cards.message: 1 PM: Afternoon delight? More like having YOU in my life is the real delight! 💝

cards.title: Hour 15 — 2 PM
cards.message: 2 PM: My love for you grows stronger with every passing hour. 💪

cards.title: Hour 16 — 3 PM
cards.message: 3 PM: Afternoon vibes and birthday smiles! You deserve it all! 😄

cards.title: Hour 17 — 4 PM
cards.message: 4 PM: You make every moment magical, my love. ✨

cards.title: Hour 18 — 5 PM
cards.message: 5 PM: The golden hour is just like you — absolutely stunning. 🌄

cards.title: Hour 19 — 6 PM
cards.message: 6 PM: Sunset colors remind me of the warmth you bring to my life. 🧡

cards.title: Hour 20 — 7 PM
cards.message: 7 PM: Evening falls, but my love for you never dims. 🌆

cards.title: Hour 21 — 8 PM
cards.message: 8 PM: Dinner time! May your birthday feast be as sweet as you! 🎂

cards.title: Hour 22 — 9 PM
cards.message: 9 PM: The night is young and so is our love story! 💃

cards.title: Hour 23 — 10 PM
cards.message: 10 PM: Under the stars, I wish you the happiest birthday ever! 🌟

cards.title: Hour 24 — 11 PM
cards.message: 11 PM: The day is almost over, but my love for you is forever. 💖
